perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with a grey flat cap and glasses (Tim) is seen in an airport lounge giving a thumbs up. (2) Chronological sequence showing a white AGI wall charger being plugged into various power outlets on the floor and wall. (3) Tim holds the product packaging for the AGI AP138 Wall Charger and speaks to the camera. (4) Visual demonstration of the charger connected to an iPad, iPhone, and MacBook simultaneously. (5) Tim packs his tech gear, including the charger and a portable SSD, into a grey sling bag. (6) Tim waves at the camera while entering an elevator in a hotel-like hallway.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music with a steady beat starts immediately. (2) A male voice (Tim) begins narrating in an enthusiastic, fast-paced, and friendly tone. (3) Digital 'swish' and 'pop' sound effects occur during scene transitions and when graphics appear on screen. (4) Subtle ambient background noise of a public space is audible but kept low behind the narration and music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles throughout the video translating the spoken narration. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '3c有意思tim哥' logo in the top left; 'AP138 Wall Charger' title; '120g' weight highlight; '30% -> 85%' charging progress bar; '動態配電功能' (Dynamic Power Allocation) feature label.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Product Feature Showcase -> Real-world Practical Demonstration -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (male), 3 blurry passers-by in the background of the lounge and hallway.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian male with glasses, a grey patterned flat cap, a blue 'Roots' hoodie, and multiple wooden bead bracelets.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Modern airport lounge with sleek seating and luggage; hotel room with power outlets and desk; elevator hallway with textured walls.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural light from windows mixed with bright indoor studio-quality lighting.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut with digital sound effect accents

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> Feature Breakdown -> Practical Use Case -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional review designed to market the AGI AP138 Wall Charger. It emphasizes the product's portability (120g), versatile charging capabilities (3 ports for phone, tablet, and laptop), and aesthetic appeal for frequent travelers or digital nomads who need to minimize luggage while staying powered up.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator identifies the brand 'AGI' multiple times, showcases the product packaging, provides specific technical specifications (67W, 120g), and demonstrates its usage in a practical scenario.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tim's characteristic flat cap and energetic, friendly '3C' expert persona.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-frequency cuts and variety-show style text pop-ups common in Taiwanese tech influencer content to maintain high viewer engagement.
